Video.summary: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Out Of The Cage - Adrian Miles.mov

Video.summary: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.

Video.summary: Brandt Dewsberry came to MMA in an effort to learn to cope with his anger and selfishness. At HK34, in a match against Sergej Juskevic, he has to channel all of his new found skills to come out on top.

Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Brandt Dewsberry

HKFC 24 - Devon Smith v. Derek Daku

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 continues with two action-packed Light Heavyweight matchups. Anton Tokarchuk takes on Josh Heinz, and UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace goes the distance against Kalib Starnes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Video.summary: In the series finale, middleweight Kyacey Uscola tries to best his fastest KO (an amazing 5 seconds) when he goes in the ring against the highly skilled South African wrestler, Trevor Prangley.

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Tom Theocharis at HK50
